cases.prompt_body: Documentary vertical photograph of an unmarked 1980s shuttle-derived launch stack on a gray crawler-pad platform, white orbiter partly hidden by fixed service gantry and launch-platform steel so wing and tail marking areas are not visible, orange external tank and twin white boosters keep canonical shuttle-stack proportions, flat Florida coastal daylight, calm routine prelaunch stillness, blank vehicle skin, no insignia, no flags, no decals, no agency marks, no readable markings, no ignition, no plume

Long-lens documentary photograph of a distant unmarked shuttle-era orbiter tank and booster stack held motionless on launch-pad infrastructure, rear three-quarter angle with gantry shadows and structural railings obscuring side-body surfaces, white orbiter surfaces remain plain and blank, orange external tank, pale sky, muted coastal light, routine operational calm is the wrong state, no logos, no flags, no lettering, no vehicle name, no body decals, no smoke, no fire

Documentary photograph of a late-1980s engineering decision table in a plain institutional conference room, five restrained figures in believable fixed positions divided by table geometry, one empty chair and cold blue window light imply the burden shift and icy launch conditions, bare acoustic walls with no boards and no posted papers, plain folders with blank covers only, fluorescent beige-gray room, period chairs and table, no readable documents, no wall charts, no screens, no labels, no courtroom drama

Observed interior photograph of a sparse 1980s engineering teleconference room during a launch decision, small group seated around a plain table while one manager stands quietly beside a cold blue window, all walls are blank acoustic panels, tabletop holds only blank closed folders and a plain telephone, hands are simple and mostly resting, social pressure shown by spacing and posture, institutional fluorescent light, no whiteboards, no charts, no posted papers, no binder labels, no readable text, no modern laptops, no courtroom staging
